title: Does Anyone Have a Massive data base of the market?
author: tommymags
selftext: Hey, I'm looking for a giant piece of data that I could feed my A.I. to learn from and get ideas of how markets fluctuate and why they fluctuate. What are good trading strategies? What should we do in certain positions? What's the most likely best outcome? If we do this, if we don't do that, just a bunch of data that I could train an A.I. with. Does anybody know the best place to get that other than just scraping it myself?

comments.author: FantasticShine4012
comments.body: Give me a week and my site will be online.  Just hook up with me

replies.author: tommymags
replies.body: I dont swing that way my man
